recommendations.title: The Night
recommendations.overview: An Iranian couple living in the US become trapped inside a hotel when insidious events force them to face the secrets that have come between them, in a night that never ends.

recommendations.title: Guava Island
recommendations.overview: Deni Maroon, a musician and dock worker is determined to pull off a music festival against the interests of the local factory owner.

recommendations.title: The Watchers
recommendations.overview: A young artist gets stranded in an extensive, immaculate forest in western Ireland, where, after finding shelter, she becomes trapped alongside three strangers, stalked by mysterious creatures each night.

recommendations.title: Whisper
recommendations.overview: Sinister things begin happening to kidnappers who are holding a young boy for ransom in a remote cabin.

recommendations.title: Delicious
recommendations.overview: During their vacation in the French countryside, a wealthy German family becomes entangled with a young hotel worker harboring sinister intentions.

recommendations.title: Pretty Lethal
recommendations.overview: A troupe of ballerinas find themselves fighting for survival as they attempt to escape from a remote inn after their bus breaks down on the way to a dance competition.

recommendations.title: What Ever Happened to Baby Jane?
recommendations.overview: A former vaudeville child star viciously torments her paraplegic sister in their decaying Hollywood mansion.

recommendations.title: Vivarium
recommendations.overview: A young woman and her fiancé are in search of the perfect starter home. After following a mysterious real estate agent to a new housing development, the couple finds themselves trapped in a maze of identical houses and forced to raise an otherworldly

recommendations.title: Always Watching: A Marble Hornets Story
recommendations.overview: A small town news team discovers a box of videotapes wherein a faceless figure, dressed in a dark suit, haunts and torments a family...slowly driving them insane. Soon after, they realize that the 'Operator' has begun to stalk them as well.

recommendations.title: The Trial
recommendations.overview: Arrested for an unnamed crime, Josef K. is trapped in a surreal bureaucratic maze where justice is unknowable and guilt is assumed.
